name: sysf.io
descriptor: Fine-tuned Apertus, running where your data lives.
tagline: AI for the data you can't send away.
description: sysf.io is a Swiss engineering studio that fine-tunes Apertus — Switzerland's open LLM from EPFL, ETH Zurich and CSCS — on your documents and runs it inside your infrastructure: on-prem, Swiss cloud, or fully air-gapped. Open weights your auditors can inspect, no US API in the loop, and you own the resulting model.
shortDescription: Swiss sovereign AI: fine-tuned Apertus running in your jurisdiction — open weights, no US APIs, you own the model.

baseModel.name: Apertus
baseModel.by: EPFL, ETH Zurich & the Swiss National Supercomputing Centre (CSCS)
